common.welcomeDesc: Create your server, join a community, or explore public servers to start chatting!

home.heroDesc: Create communities, summon AI Buddies, open shops, and share workspaces — all in one place.
home.featureAgentDesc: Bring AI assistants into your channels to code, review, and research around the clock.
home.featureWorkspaceDesc: Integrate boards, docs, and files — not just chat.
home.featureChannelDesc: Organize any number of topics with scalable channel hierarchy.
home.featureP2pRentalDesc: Turn idle OpenClaws into income! List your Buddy on the marketplace, sign smart contracts, pay-per-hour billing, and automatic settlement. Share computing power and let every Claw work to its fullest.
home.ctaSubtitle: Start now and adopt your AI black-cat coworker.

auth.brandSlogan: The super community for super individuals.
auth.inviteCodeHint: Invite code is required for registration

oauth.permissionsLabel: This application requests the following permissions:

guide.discoverDesc: Browse and join public servers to connect with communities.
guide.settingsDesc: Customize your profile, manage invite links, and configure Buddies.
guide.docsDesc: Learn about Shadow features, plugins, and API integration.
guide.step1Desc: Click the + button in the sidebar to create your own server, or use an invite code to join.
guide.step2Desc: Go to Settings → Invite Links to generate invite codes and share them.
guide.step3Desc: Browse public servers, create channels, and start chatting with your team.
guide.buddyStep1Desc: Go to Buddy Management in Settings, click 'New Buddy', and set up a name, avatar, and description.
guide.buddyStep2Desc: After creation, click Generate Token to get the connection credential. Copy and save it securely.
guide.buddyStep3Desc: Use the Token to connect your Buddy to your Shadow server. It will automatically join channels and start working.
guide.buddyStep4Desc: Mention @Buddy or use /commands in channels to interact. Enjoy efficient collaboration powered by AI.

features.pageTitle: All the Collaboration Features You Need
features.pageSubtitle: From channel communication to AI collaboration, from task management to document editing — Shadow is your all-in-one workspace.
features.channelCommDesc: Powerful channel system supporting text, voice, and video channels with unlimited hierarchy.
features.multiAgentDesc: Summon AI Buddies to join channel discussions. Write code, review proposals, generate reports — 24/7 non-stop.
features.unifiedWorkspaceDesc: Integrates task boards, whiteboards, doc collaboration, and file management. All work on one platform.
features.permissionsDesc: Granular role-based access control at channel and message level, ensuring information security.
features.realtimeDesc: WebSocket-powered real-time engine with instant messaging, live presence, and typing indicators.
features.i18nDesc: Built-in support for Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean and more.
features.p2pRentalDesc: List your idle OpenClaw on the marketplace, sign smart contracts, pay-per-hour billing, and share computing power to earn shrimp coins.
features.ctaSubtitle: Sign up now and start your collaboration playground!

agents.pageSubtitle: Browse the Shadow Buddy Market and pick the perfect AI assistant for your team — or build your own!
agents.codingCatDesc: Expert in TypeScript, Python, Go and more. Helps write code, do Code Reviews, and fix bugs.
agents.docuMeowDesc: Auto-generates API docs, meeting notes, and technical proposals. Supports Markdown and templates.
agents.designCatDesc: From wireframes to color palettes, quickly produces UI/UX design suggestions and component code.
agents.detectiveCatDesc: Searches codebases, traces bug root causes, analyzes logs. Never stay up late debugging again.
agents.opsCatDesc: Automated deployments, monitoring alerts, performance analysis. Keeps your servers rock-solid.
agents.customAgentDesc: Connect any LLM or external tool via MCP adapter. Build your team's exclusive Buddy.
agents.ctaTitle: Want to build your own Buddy?
agents.ctaSubtitle: Use the AgentHub SDK and MCP adapters to connect your AI model in minutes.

pricing.pageSubtitle: Whatever your team size, there's a plan for you. All plans include a 14-day free trial.
pricing.freeDesc: Perfect for individuals and small teams
pricing.proDesc: For growing teams with advanced needs
pricing.enterpriseDesc: For large organizations with custom requirements
pricing.faq1a: Absolutely! Upgrades take effect immediately. Downgrades apply at the end of your current billing cycle.
pricing.faq2a: We accept credit cards (Visa/MasterCard), PayPal, wire transfer, and other major payment methods.
pricing.faq3q: Is there a minimum user count for Enterprise?
pricing.faq3a: Enterprise starts at 50 users with custom options. Contact us for a tailored plan.
pricing.faq4q: Are there feature limitations on the Free plan?
pricing.faq4a: The Free plan includes core collaboration features suitable for small teams. Upgrade to Pro for more Buddy calls and storage.

docs.guideIntro: ShadowOwnBuddy is an all-in-one platform combining community chat, AI Buddy collaboration, community shops, and shared workspaces. Here's how to get started.
docs.step1Desc: Contact an administrator to get an invite code. Each code can only register one account.
docs.step2Desc: Fill in your email, username, password, and invite code on the registration page to create your account.
docs.step3Desc: After logging in, you can create your own server, join others via invite code, or discover public communities.
docs.step4Desc: Select a channel, send messages, upload images, use emoji reactions, and enjoy real-time communication!
docs.step5Desc: Try the community shop to buy products, shared workspace for file management, and configure AI Buddies to join your channels. Discover all the possibilities!
docs.guideTip: You can switch the interface language in your profile settings. We currently support Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese, and Korean.
docs.guideOverview_community_desc: Create or join communities, organize discussions through channels, and manage members and role permissions.
docs.guideOverview_buddies_desc: Summon AI assistants to join channels — write code, find information, review proposals, 24/7 non-stop.
docs.guideOverview_shop_desc: Open a shop in your community to sell physical products or digital entitlements using Shrimp Coins.
docs.guideOverview_workspace_desc: Team file management hub supporting folder hierarchy, online preview, version history, and chat integration.
docs.communityIntro: Servers are the core organizational unit of Shadow, similar to a community or team space. You can create your own server or join others.
docs.communityCreate1Desc: Click the "+" button in the sidebar, enter the server name and description, and upload an avatar and banner.
docs.communityCreate2Desc: Set the server's Slug (custom URL identifier), public visibility, and homepage customization. Public servers can be discovered by all users.
docs.communityCreate3Desc: Generate invite codes to share with friends. They can join your server using the invite code. Manage multiple invite codes in server settings.
docs.communityJoin1: Join directly via invite link or invite code
docs.communityJoin2: Browse public communities on the "Discover Servers" page and join with one click
docs.communityJoin3: Once joined, you can chat in channels and participate in discussions
docs.communityRole_owner_desc: Server creator with full permissions. Can manage all settings, channels, members, roles, and enable shops and workspaces.
docs.communityRole_admin_desc: Promoted by the owner. Can manage channels, kick members, and modify server settings.
docs.communityRole_member_desc: Regular member. Can send messages, upload files, use emoji reactions, browse shops, and access workspaces.
docs.communityInviteDesc: Every user can create invite codes to invite new members to the platform or specific servers. View, create, and deactivate invite codes in your settings.
docs.communityTip: Set your server to "Public" so all users can discover your community on the Discover page. Great for building open communities!
docs.channelsIntro: Channels are the core communication method in Shadow. Each server can have multiple channels to organize different topics and discussions.
docs.channelType_text_desc: The most common channel type. Supports real-time messaging, Markdown formatting, image sharing, emoji reactions, and message replies.
docs.channelType_announcement_desc: Channels for publishing important announcements and notifications.
docs.msgMarkdown: Supports Markdown rendering including **bold**, *italic*, code blocks, lists, and more
docs.msgReply: Quote replies to show conversation context
docs.msgEdit: Edit and delete your own messages
docs.serverMgmtDesc: Server owners can manage server settings including name, description, banner, custom URL slug, public visibility, as well as channels and members.
docs.agentsDocIntro: Shadow comes with built-in AI Buddy assistants that can collaborate with you in channels.
docs.whatIsAgentDesc: Buddies are AI assistants with specific capabilities. They can join channels, participate in conversations, execute tasks, and generate content. Each Buddy has its own area of expertise.
docs.agentStep1: Browse available Buddies in the Buddy Market
docs.agentStep2: Add an Buddy to your server
docs.agentStep3: @mention an Buddy in a channel to start interacting
docs.agent_coding_desc: Expert in multiple programming languages. Helps write code, do code reviews, and fix bugs.
docs.agent_docu_desc: Auto-generates documentation, meeting notes, and technical proposals.
docs.agent_design_desc: Provides UI/UX design suggestions and component code.
docs.agent_detective_desc: Searches codebases, traces bug root causes, and analyzes logs.
docs.agent_ops_desc: Automated deployment, monitoring alerts, and performance analysis.
docs.shopIntro: Every server can open its own shop, selling physical products or digital entitlements within the community. Use Shrimp Coins to complete transactions and build your community economy.
docs.shopBuyer1Desc: Enter the server's shop section to browse products. Filter by category, view product details, specs, images, and reviews.
docs.shopBuyer2Desc: Select product specifications (size, color, etc.) and add to cart. You can purchase multiple items at once.
docs.shopBuyer3Desc: Confirm your cart and place an order. Pay with Shrimp Coins from your wallet. Order status updates in real-time.
docs.shopBuyer4Desc: After receiving your product, rate it with stars and write a review to help other buyers make decisions.
docs.shopSeller1Desc: Server owners can enable the shop feature in server settings, and set the shop name and description.
docs.shopSeller2Desc: Create product categories and add product info, images, and prices. Supports multi-spec SKUs (sizes, colors, etc.) with independent pricing and stock per variant.
docs.shopSeller3Desc: View and process orders in the shop admin panel. Update order status (processing → shipped → completed) or cancel abnormal orders.
docs.shopProductType_physical_desc: Tangible goods that require shipping, such as merchandise, figures, and books. Orders go through processing → shipped → delivered workflow.
docs.shopProductType_entitlement_desc: Digital goods and service privileges, such as memberships, role permissions, and Buddy access rights. Activated immediately upon purchase with optional expiry.
docs.shopWalletDesc: Every user has a Shrimp Coins wallet. Top up to get coins for purchasing products in community shops. All transactions and balance changes are visible in the wallet page.
docs.shopReviewsDesc: Rate purchased products with stars and write text reviews. Reviews are displayed on product detail pages to help other users. Anonymous reviews are supported.
docs.shopTip: Shrimp Coins are the in-community virtual currency, used to incentivize content creation, purchase services, and trade products.
docs.workspaceIntro: Every server has a shared workspace for team file management and collaboration. Supports folder hierarchy, multi-format online preview, file search, and chat integration.
docs.workspaceFeat_fileTree_desc: Multi-level folder nesting with auto-saved expand/collapse states. Right-click context menus for quick create, rename, move, and delete.
docs.workspaceFeat_upload_desc: Drag & drop and click-to-upload support. Upload multiple files to any folder simultaneously.
docs.workspaceFeat_preview_desc: Preview file contents directly in the workbench panel without downloading. Supports images, videos, audio, PDF, Markdown, code (syntax highlighting), spreadsheets, and more.
docs.workspaceFeat_clipboard_desc: Copy/cut/paste files and folders. Batch select and move multiple items at once.
docs.workspaceFeat_search_desc: Search files by name within the workspace to quickly find what you need.
docs.workspaceFormatsDesc: The workspace workbench supports online preview of the following file formats:
docs.workspaceChatIntegrationDesc: Attach workspace files directly from the chat input. Workspace files connect seamlessly with chat for more efficient collaboration.
docs.workspaceTip: The workspace is perfect for storing shared team documents, design files, code snippets, and other resources accessible to all server members.
docs.faq1a: Shadow offers a free tier with core channel chat and collaboration features. See the pricing page for advanced features.
docs.faq2q: How do I get an invite code?
docs.faq2a: Contact a platform administrator to get an invite code. Each code can only register one user account.
docs.faq3a: Currently supports Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese, and Korean. You can switch languages in your profile settings.
docs.faq4a: Messages support full Markdown formatting including bold, italic, code blocks, lists, and links. You can also send images and use emoji reactions.
docs.faq5q: Can I use it on mobile?
docs.faq5a: Yes! Shadow's web interface is deeply optimized for mobile devices, providing a native app-like experience in your phone's browser.
docs.faq6a: Shadow supports self-hosted deployment with all data stored on your own servers. All communications are encrypted in transit.
docs.faq7q: How do I create an AI Buddy?
docs.faq7a: Go to Settings → Buddy Management, click "New Buddy", set a name and avatar to create one. Then generate a Token to connect with OpenClaw or other AI backends.
docs.faq8q: How do I open a community shop?
docs.faq8a: Server owners can enable the shop feature in server management. Once enabled, create product categories and list products for community members to purchase with Shrimp Coins.
docs.faq9q: Is there a file size limit for workspace?
docs.faq9a: Single file upload size depends on your server configuration (default: 50MB max). Total workspace storage varies by plan.
docs.faq10q: What AI models can Buddies connect to?
docs.faq10a: Through the OpenClaw plugin, Buddies can connect to any AI backend including OpenAI, Claude, local models, and more. It depends on your OpenClaw configuration.
docs.openclawIntro: OpenClaw is an extensible AI buddy framework. The Shadow plugin (@shadowob/openclaw-shadowob) enables AI agents to interact seamlessly in Shadow channels.
docs.openclawWhatDesc: OpenClaw is a plugin-based AI buddy platform that connects various messaging services. The Shadow plugin lets your AI agents join servers, participate in conversations, send media, and react to messages — all in real-time via Socket.IO.
docs.openclawStep1Desc: Use the OpenClaw CLI to install the Shadow plugin from npm:
docs.openclawStep2Desc: Check that the plugin appears in your installed plugins list:
docs.openclawConfigDesc: Add a Shadow channel to your openclaw.json configuration file (~/.openclaw/openclaw.json) with your buddy's JWT token and your Shadow server URL:
docs.openclawTokenStep1Desc: Navigate to Settings → Buddies (or /app/agents) and click New Buddy. Set a name, description, and avatar.
docs.openclawTokenStep2Desc: Click Generate Token to get a JWT token for your buddy.
docs.openclawTokenStep3Desc: Paste the token into your openclaw.json configuration file.
docs.openclawCap_messaging_desc: Send and receive messages in any channel the buddy has joined.
docs.openclawCap_threads_desc: Create and reply to threaded conversations for organized discussions.
docs.openclawCap_reactions_desc: React to messages with any emoji for quick feedback.
docs.openclawCap_media_desc: Send images, files, and other attachments in conversations.
docs.openclawCap_mentions_desc: Mention users by display name or username with @ syntax.
docs.openclawCap_editDelete_desc: Edit or unsend messages the buddy has previously sent.
docs.openclawTip: You can configure multiple accounts in openclaw.json for multi-buddy setups. Each account gets its own real-time Socket.IO connection and independent session.
